headline: U.S. mining stocks dive as gold and other metals under pressure on Iran tensions
summary: Investing.com -- U.S. Mining stocks fell on Monday after gold and silver prices dived amid fears of inflation sparked by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, as crude oil prices jumped.

raw.headline: U.S. mining stocks dive as gold and other metals under pressure on Iran tensions

headline: Newmont’s Operational Setbacks Test Cost Discipline And Margin Resilience
summary: Newmont (NYSE:NEM) has suspended underground mining at its Cadia operation after an earthquake, creating uncertainty around near term production. Ghana has introduced a new tax framework that adds further cost pressure to Newmont's African operations. Wildfire related impacts at the Boddington mine are adding to operational disruptions and resource constraints. National Bank has downgraded Newmont, highlighting rising operating costs and production headwinds that weigh on near term...

headline: Should you own mining stocks are Iran war rages on? Bernstein weighs in
summary: Investing.com -- The weeks-long war in the Middle East has roiled commodity markets and left investors thinking that "peak pain" may already be behind us, according to Bernstein.

headline: GGN’s 6.5% Yield Hides a Costly Secret for Income Investors
summary: GAMCO Global Gold, Natural Resources & Income Trust (NYSE:GGN) pays a monthly distribution and currently yields around 6.5% annualized at its recent share price of $5.51. That yield attracts income investors drawn to gold and natural resources, but the mechanics behind the payout raise questions worth understanding before treating this as reliable income. How GGN ...
